title: Evangelion Movie Box Set
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Movie Box Set             Quote Post by ILUVASUKALANGLEY » Mon Sep 16, 2013 12:44 pm are these the only two sets? LaserDisc box and VHS box or is there another box with another format? I'll make more shots later SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Sep 16, 2013 1:44 pm The Manga-vision DVD set - that's what I have, though I've ripped the dub and subs to add to a proper copy of the video... (I think the R2 PAL version is slightly less dreadful than the original R1 version - but it's not good)

[]:             Quote Post by ILUVASUKALANGLEY » Mon Sep 16, 2013 2:26 pm I am sorry if it wasn't clear. Its the box set as shown above the ones released by King Records. I was wondering if all there is are those two examples or there might other ones like them that are on DVD and VCD. I just haven't seen any info on this and when I came across the VHS edition I just bought to go with the LD version.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Sep 16, 2013 4:02 pm This website might be a good start: http://svenge.pcriot.com/

[]:             Quote Post by ILUVASUKALANGLEY » Mon Sep 16, 2013 4:26 pm thanks I forgot about SVENGE's site (i'll have to bookmark now so I can go back to it) EDIT: I suppose only these two editions exist but I'll just send SVENGE a PM to make sure. Also I will be taking pictures of both my copies VHS and LD sometime. Might even later. Will be viewable at X310.info/Xtra
